title: adinandra obtusata
intro: Adinandra obtusata, also known as the Bayang-bayang tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Theaceae. It is native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever and respiratory infections. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Adinandra obtusata is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and can also be dried and made into capsules or tinctures for modern use.
